name: Brethren's Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Sift together dry ingredients: flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt.
3. Cut in margarine until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
4. Stir in shredded cheese and dill weed.
5. Add milk and eggs; mix just until moistened.
6. Spoon batter into 4 well-greased 6x3-1/2 inch loaf pans.
7. Bake at 400°F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until golden brown.
8. Makes 4 loaves.
If using a different type of pan or baking dish, keep an eye on the bread to ensure it is not overcooked or undercooked.
